Settings

Configuration and environment details

Environment

API Basehttp://localhost:8000
Version0.1.0 — Prompt 1 (~30% complete)
Active PipelineP0-deterministic-scope-baseline
Gold EnginePandas + DuckDB (dual agreement)
Default Seed42
DatabaseSQLite (data/faulttrace.db)

Set FAULTTRACE_DATA_ROOT, FAULTTRACE_DATABASE_URL, and NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL environment variables to override defaults.
